root_text.sn35.101:1.2: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:1.6: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:1.9: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn35.101:1.12: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:1.15: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:1.16: Yampidaṁ cakkhusamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi na tumhākaṁ.
root_text.sn35.101:1.18: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:2.3: Sā vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:2.6: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn35.101:2.9: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:2.12: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:2.13: Yampidaṁ jivhāsamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi na tumhākaṁ.
root_text.sn35.101:2.14: Taṁ pajahatha. Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati …pe….
root_text.sn35.101:3.3: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:3.6: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn35.101:3.9: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:3.12: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:3.13: Yampidaṁ manosamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi na tumhākaṁ.
root_text.sn35.101:3.15: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:4.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, yaṁ imasmiṁ jetavane tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṁ taṁ jano hareyya vā ḍaheyya vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā kareyya,
root_text.sn35.101:4.3: ‘amhe jano harati vā ḍahati vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karotī’”ti?
root_text.sn35.101:7.1: “Na hi no etaṁ, bhante, attā vā attaniyaṁ vā”ti.
root_text.sn35.101:8.3: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.101:8.7: yampidaṁ manosamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi na tumhākaṁ.
root_text.sn35.101:8.9: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissatī”ti.

translation_text.sn35.101:1.2: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.101:1.4: The eye isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.101:1.6: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.101:1.16: The pleasant, painful, or neutral feeling that arises dependent on eye contact isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.101:1.18: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.101:3.1: The mind isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.101:3.3: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.101:3.13: The pleasant, painful, or neutral feeling that arises dependent on mind contact isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.101:3.15: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.101:4.1: Suppose a person was to carry off the grass, sticks, branches, and leaves in this Jeta’s Grove, or burn them, or do what they want with them.
translation_text.sn35.101:4.3: ‘This person is carrying us off, burning us, or doing what they want with us’?”
translation_text.sn35.101:7.1: Because  to us that’s neither self nor belonging to self.”
translation_text.sn35.101:8.1: “In the same way, the eye isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.101:8.3: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness. …
translation_text.sn35.101:8.7: The pleasant, painful, or neutral feeling that arises dependent on mind contact isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.101:8.9: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.”
